[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100001000 3
1 1111011010 7
2 0010001001 3
3 0101111111 8
4 1011110011 7
5 1111111111 a
6 1100111110 7
7 1111101110 8

01 10 1111111111 a match 5
12 21 1100111110 7 match 6
23 32 1111101110 8 match 7
34 43 1111001110 7
45 54 1111011010 7 match 1
56 65 1111011011 8
67 76 0111111111 9
70 07 1111111111 a match 5

13 31 1111011110 8
24 42 1100101010 5
35 53 1111011110 8
46 64 1110001001 5
57 75 1111111111 a match 5
60 06 1011111011 8
71 17 0101111111 8 match 3

03 30 1111111111 a match 5
14 41 1100011100 5
25 52 1111111010 8

47 74 1101111111 9
50 05 1111111011 9
61 16 0110011101 6
72 27 1101111111 9

04 40 1111111011 9
15 51 1111011110 8

37 73 1111111111 a match 5
